abstract: A key with a value that indicates when the keychain item is accessible.
overview:
## Discussion

The corresponding value, one of those found in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/item-attribute-keys-and-values#Accessibility-Values], indicates when your app needs access to the data in a keychain item. Choose the most restrictive option that meets your app’s needs so that the system can protect that item to the greatest extent possible. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/restricting-keychain-item-accessibility].

# kSecAttrAccessible

**Global Variable**

A key with a value that indicates when the keychain item is accessible.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrAccessible: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value, one of those found in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/item-attribute-keys-and-values#Accessibility-Values], indicates when your app needs access to the data in a keychain item. Choose the most restrictive option that meets your app’s needs so that the system can protect that item to the greatest extent possible. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/restricting-keychain-item-accessibility].
title: kSecAttrAccessible
